57024336.transcript: It's too late for compassion now.

62459786.transcript: I'll give you this, you're stupidly persistent.

64500749.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
64500749.transcript: Time to bid you folks adios!

jp.literal: There! I'll have you move out of the way!

jp.literal: You're quick to adapt to that!

jp.text: ヴェインくん、いい仕事するね！
jp.literal: Vane-kun, you're doing a great job!

jp.text: うふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふ

69866739.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
69866739.transcript: Yep! They don't call you the Lord of Flames for nothing!

jp.text: へぇ、さすがエンテって名乗るだけはあるね。
jp.literal: Huh. You really live up to your title as the 'Limitless'.

jp.text: ふぅ、助かったよオイゲン
jp.literal: Phew! Thanks for saving me, Eugen!

74073963.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
74073963.transcript: That's a colorful description, but I'll take it!

jp.literal: H-How astonishing... that's quite a statement.

78747262.transcript: Gotta hit the abs! Easy peasy.

jp.text:

ヒッ！

79158326.transcript: Keep up the good work, Rackam!

jp.text: さ、次行ってみようか、ラカム。
jp.literal: Alright, let's go to the next one, Rackam!

83256944.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
83256944.transcript: You think this primal can stop us? You've got another thing coming!

jp.text: この聖晶獣も抑止力のようなもの。破壊させてもらう！
jp.literal: This Holy Relic is like a curse. I'll destroy it!

89094736.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_quest_start_1
89094736.transcript: Alright! Let's get a move on!

94045158.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
94045158.transcript: It must suck to be on the losing side.

95132838.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
95132838.transcript: It's kinda funny. We're both sword guys, but our fighting styles couldn't be more different.

jp.text: 同じ剣の使い手同士なのに、こうも戦い方が違うなんてね。
jp.literal: Even though we're both wielders of the same sword, it's amazing how different our fighting styles are.

96412878.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
96412878.transcript: Hold on! That sounded like a compliment!

jp.text: うん、見直してくれたかい？
jp.literal: Huh? You've come to check on me?
You've got to be kidding me!

102132316.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
102132316.transcript: We're not out of the woods yet!

jp.text: みんな、油断しちゃだめだからね！
jp.literal: Everyone, we can't let our guard down!

109873465.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
109873465.transcript: Alright, Mr. Motivation, let's do it!

jp.text: キウミルニビンテヤツダネ。リョウカイ。
jp.literal: I see you're a real sharpshooter. Understood.

117127988.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
117127988.transcript: I do believe I'm the strongest gentleman in all the skies.

jp.text: 全空最強はダテじゃないでしょ？
jp.literal: I'm not just a show-off, am I?

118636458.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
118636458.transcript: I'm glad I'm on your side!

121577993.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
121577993.transcript: Cute and deadly, I dig it!

134087913.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
134087913.transcript: We can't let him escape with Lyria!

jp.text: シリゾケルシカナサソウダネ
jp.literal: Looks like I'll have to back off.

139363662.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
139363662.transcript: Hah! Another win for the crew!

jp.text: ヒッ！ハッ！俺たちの勝ちだね！
jp.literal: Hah! Hah! We're the ones who won, huh?

143825888.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
143825888.transcript: Oh please, I'm nothing without your hefty support.

jp.text: 君が開いた道をただ進んだだけなんだけどね
jp.literal: I'm just following the path you opened.

147802944.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_comeback_2
147802944.transcript: Sorry. I feel like an idiot.

jp.text: まさか、ここまでとはね。
jp.literal: No way... I didn't think it'd come to this.

jp.text: ガンガン攻めていこっか！
いいじゃんいいじゃん！
元より承知さ。行ける伝説！
jp.literal: I'm counting on you more than ever, Legendary!

158507731.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
158507731.transcript: Give it up for the almighty Rolan!

jp.text: いやー、流石だね、ローラン。

158673619.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
158673619.transcript: Thanks! You wanna take the next one?

jp.text: どうも、また助けられちゃったね。
jp.literal: Hey, looks like you've saved my neck again.

jp.text: 少し遊んであげようか

164727456.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
164727456.transcript: We'll wrap this up in five!

jp.literal: There's no such thing as that!

170030474.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
170030474.transcript: You still in there, Eddy? We're comin' for ya!

jp.text: 聞こえているんだろー！俺たちの声が！
jp.literal: You can hear it, right? Our voices.

176691760.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
176691760.transcript: Oh nice! This guy looks fun!

jp.text: いいね。少しは面白くなりそうだ
jp.literal: Good. This might be fun after all.

177196645.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
177196645.transcript: Oh yeah, right on the money!

178367432.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_8_charge_1

jp.text: そして、かの七聖を喝采せよ！

182495307.label: PL2200_vo_DUO_recovery_B_2
182495307.transcript: Heh... I don't seem desperate, do I?

バッチリ決まったじゃない！

189365919.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900

jp.text: さすがだね、イドくんは

jp.literal: Hmph. The Seikishi are quite reliable.

jp.text: 切り札は最後まで取っておくものさ！ シエンミルエス パワーアップ！
jp.literal:
I'll keep my trump card until the very end.  
Seven Star's Brilliance!

196418070.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
196418070.transcript: So von of the eternals is badass!

jp.text: バザラガ！もっと気楽にいこう！
カオスデトネーション！

211433323.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
211433323.transcript: They don't call me the strongest man in the sky realm for nothing!

jp.text: 全空最強の看板に偽りはないのさ
jp.literal: There's no lie in the sign of the strongest in the sky.

jp.text: そろそろ眠ってもらおうか
jp.literal: I think it's about time you got some rest.

219995630.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_A
219995630.transcript: Looks like we poke the bear too much.

jp.text: 本気出してきたみたいだね
jp.literal: Looks like they're pulling out all the stops.

220676650.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
220676650.transcript: What can I say? We're a ragtag bunch!

jp.text: こらこら、見世物じゃないよ。

226286585.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
226286585.transcript: You wield that sword beautifully, just like a butterfly.

jp.text: 校長の喧嘩、美しいもんだね。

226623936.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
226623936.transcript: Wait a minute... those techniques remind me of Ayato.

jp.text: へえ、ちょっとだけ奥義との技に似てるかもね。

227180994.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
227180994.transcript: You said it! You gotta take me to the gym sometime!

jp.text: ヨッ、消えてる！また筋トレ、ご一緒しちゃおっかな？
jp.literal: Yo! It's gone! Let's do some more muscle training together!

229534085.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
229534085.transcript: So, did you like what you saw?

jp.text: お兄さんの力、見直したかい？
jp.literal: Did you take another look at my brother's power?

jp.text: ほーらほーら、こっちだよ！

235625533.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_lockon_2
235625533.transcript: I'm going to ruin their whole career.

jp.text: お手並み拝見と行きますか
jp.literal: Shall we go for a look at the view?

240797431.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
240797431.transcript: So we're up against the Dragon of Destruction. Fun.

jp.text: まさか…破壊の龍と相対することになるとは…
jp.literal: I never thought I'd have to face the Dragon of Destruction.

242594610.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
242594610.transcript: There's a time and a place for every power.

jp.text: やるときはやるのよね！
jp.literal: You sure know how to throw down, huh?

243705409.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_7_god_3
243705409.transcript: Sure! I can do this the hard way!

jp.text: 最強を味わってみるかい！

jp.literal: This is the sword of legend!

jp.text: ほら、全力でかかって来てよ！
jp.literal: Come on, hit me with everything you've got!

253340512.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
253340512.transcript: I gotta say, that power of yours is pretty interesting!

jp.text: やるじゃない。ほんと興味深い力だね。
jp.literal: Well, well. That's quite the interesting power you've got there.
Will it be of any use?

262040174.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
262040174.transcript: Wait, I thought you were the mysterious one in this crew.

jp.text: あらら、それはお互い様なんじゃない？
jp.literal: Oh my, isn't that a case of 'same to you'?

jp.text: そろそろ終わりにしよう
jp.literal: Let's bring this to an end.

jp.text: さすがだよ、シャルロッテちゃん。
ナラクノフォールダウン！
プリジオンデアルマス！

jp.literal: I won't let you get away!
Ah, we're on the same wavelength.

296322382.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
296322382.transcript: Yeah! We had perfect synergy on that one!

jp.text: バッチリだったよ、ナルメアちゃん！
ツァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァ

299589733.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_4_god_1
299589733.transcript: Go on, dig your own grave.

jp.text: ザコに興味はないんだけど
jp.literal: I'm not interested in the weaklings.

308975272.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
308975272.transcript: One! Two! Three! Four! Five! Six!

jp.literal: One, two, three, four, five, six!

jp.text: ふん！足止めさせてもらうよ！
jp.literal: Hmph. Let me pin you down!
Alright, let's go all at once!

jp.text: さあ、お兄さんと遊ぼうか
jp.literal: Well then, shall we play with big brother?

321214270.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
321214270.transcript: We either put up or shut up, and I don't shut up.

jp.text: 遅いかかってくるのなら、倒すしかないね。
jp.literal: If you're going to attack me, then I have no choice but to defeat you.

321820479.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
321820479.transcript: Oh, that shield won't stop me!

321877171.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
321877171.transcript: I don't mind playing teacher, especially for such a motivated student.

jp.text: 君ほどの達人の参考になれるなら、いくらでも協力するからね。
jp.literal: If I can be of any help to a master like you, I'll cooperate as much as you want.

jp.text: ふふん、どういたしまして

334717631.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
334717631.transcript: I like the cut of this guy's jib.

jp.text: その異性、嫌いじゃないよ
jp.literal: I don't hate that kind of sacrifice.

335107117.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
335107117.transcript: Kill a god, save the skies. It's as easy as that.

jp.text: 神を切って空を守る。ただそれだけのことさ。
jp.literal: Cutting through the heavens to protect the sky. That's all there is to it.

jp.text: よし！この調子でいこうか！
jp.literal: Alright, let's go with this momentum!

342704121.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
342704121.transcript: Prepped and ready for the next fight!

jp.text: それにしてもタフだね

346610837.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
346610837.transcript: That's what you deserve! For messing with the best!

jp.text: 全空最強はダテじゃないからね！
jp.literal: The strongest in the sky isn't just for show!

jp.text: ふう…もう少し骨があるものかと
jp.literal: Huh. I thought you had a bit more backbone.

354692526.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
354692526.transcript: Hah! You think numbers will save you?

jp.text: 数で勝てると思ったのかい？
jp.literal: You thought you could win with sheer numbers?

363472887.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
363472887.transcript: Nice! Got it square in the muzzle!

jp.literal: Well, this much is a given.

374030334.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
374030334.transcript: You know it! Swords are just the coolest!

jp.text: やっぱり剣が一番かっこいいよね！
jp.literal: I knew it! Swords are the coolest!

375129061.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
375129061.transcript: Sorry, we got places to be.

jp.text: 悪いね、もう見切ってるよ
jp.literal: You're in trouble. I've seen enough.

jp.text: 覚悟はいいかい、イドくん！

376633535.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
376633535.transcript: Your power... you've got a handle on it, right?

jp.text: やはりその力、危なくない？

377883561.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
377883561.transcript: So this is what it's like to fight with a living legend.

jp.text: さすがはイケる伝説か
jp.literal: So you're the legendary one, huh?

377887672.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
377887672.transcript: You've got nothing on our crew!

jp.text: どうだい！俺たちの連携の味は！
jp.literal: How's that? The taste of our cooperation?
I'll only help if you're reliable.

jp.text: うまく繋がったんじゃない？
jp.literal: We're linked up pretty well, aren't we?

392339469.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
392339469.transcript: Our next fight awaits your whip, my good ferry!

jp.text: フェリちゃん、次もついてこられるかい？
jp.literal: Ferry-chan, can you keep up with me again?

392544479.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
392544479.transcript: You want me to teach you? Someone pinch me!

277576360.transcript: Whew! Thanks for coming to my rescue!

jp.text: 助かったよ、ベアトリクスちゃん。

292705546.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
292705546.transcript: Phew! Almost panicked there! Thanks a billion!

jp.text: いやー、助かったよ。ありがとうね。
jp.literal: Yeah, that was a close one. Thanks.

293562696.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
293562696.transcript: Oh, what's that, Id? You want the full story behind my awe-inspiring collection?

jp.text: おっ、イド君は天星拳王の技に興味ありかい？
jp.literal: Oh, so you're interested in the techniques of the Heavenly Sword King, Id?

315582007.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
315582007.transcript: Good thing you're on our side.

jp.text: 仲間だと本当に心強いね
jp.literal: It's really comforting to know we have you as a comrade.

318578666.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
318578666.transcript: Eh, when you really think about it, what are titles worth?

jp.text: まあねー。俺だって頑張ってるんだから。
jp.literal: Well, I'm trying my best too, you know.

320322925.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0000
320322925.transcript: We'd die for you, you know!

jp.text: みんなで団長ちゃんをサポートするね！

342269457.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
342269457.transcript: How can you say that? I've been trying to impress you.

jp.text: なになに？そんな目で見られると緊張しちゃうな。
jp.literal: What's the matter? I get all nervous when you look at me like that.

358340089.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
358340089.transcript: And? You like what you see?

jp.text: どう？案外凄いと思わない？
jp.literal: How's that? Not what you expected, right?

361584726.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
361584726.transcript: Haha! What kind of stakes are we talking?

jp.text: ははっ、元気があってよろしい
jp.literal: Glad to see you're doing well!

jp.text: マギラフリーダちゃん！

414389990.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
414389990.transcript: Please do! You're nowhere near your limits!

jp.text: そういう君こそ、まだ全力じゃないでしょ。
jp.literal: You're not giving it your all, are you?

453466328.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
453466328.transcript: A plus axe work, Vane! Big fan!

jp.text: ナイスな一撃だったてよ、ウェイン君！
jp.literal: That was a nice hit, Vane-kun!

468682172.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
468682172.transcript: Oh, not for a long, long time. Wait, am I crying?

jp.text: なんか久しぶりにまっすぐほめられた気がする。あれ、涙が…
jp.literal: I feel like I've been straight-up complimented for the first time in ages... Huh? I'm crying?

497297079.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
497297079.transcript: I'm sorry, Seofon can't come to the transceiver right now.

500449173.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
500449173.transcript: I'm insulted! I always give my all!

jp.text: 嫌だなあ。これでもちゃんと全力全開よ？
jp.literal: I don't like this. Even so, I'll go all out.

508137021.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
508137021.transcript: Eh, luck? I just take what the enemy gives me.

jp.text: いやー、目の前のことでいっぱいいっぱいだよ。
jp.literal: I'm swamped with what's right in front of me.

560511322.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
560511322.transcript: That was too easy. Up for another, Narmaya?

jp.text: さすがはナルメアちゃんだね。次も行けそう？
jp.literal: You're amazing, Narmaya! Can you do it again?

572549186.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
572549186.transcript: We're like two peas in an exceptional pod.

jp.text: もしかしたらフラウちゃんも特別なのかもね

jp.literal: Nice! That was a good one!

593225989.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
593225989.transcript: Score one for the super cute genius alchemist!

jp.text: さすが天才美少女錬金術師だよね
jp.literal: You're quite the genius, aren't you, alchemist?

594769647.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
594769647.transcript: Uh-oh! I'd better sleep with one eye open!

jp.text: おっと、これは油断できないね。
jp.literal: Oh, this is no time to let our guard down.

599499649.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
599499649.transcript: Guess I need to level up my game.

jp.text: 俺もウカウカしてられないなあ
jp.literal: I can't just stand around waiting either.

607577281.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
607577281.transcript: Yeah. Still a ways off before he reaches his potential.

jp.text: うーん、まだまだ最強には届かないかもね。
jp.literal: Hmm... I'm still not quite reaching the strongest.

625457509.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
625457509.transcript: Man, if I had half your confidence, my life woulda turned out way different.

jp.text: これは剣託といって、実存的な魔剣とは少し違うかな？
jp.literal: This is called "Ken-taku." It's a bit different from a practical sword, don't you think?

641195114.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
641195114.transcript: Hey, don't exaggerate. I'm uh, as deep as a fishbowl. Honest.

jp.text: またまた、そうやって持ち上げちゃって！
jp.literal: You're lifting me up again like that...

660910860.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
660910860.transcript: How would I put it... Ah! Mesmerizing!

jp.text: うん、そうだね。魅力的だよ。

667371467.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
667371467.transcript: You can't ask for a duel during a battle! It's... unprofessional!

jp.text: ちょ、ちょっと！戦闘中に果たし状なんか渡さないでよ！
jp.literal: H-hey! Don't hand me a "Hatachi Jō" during combat!

669839971.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
669839971.transcript: You were fantastic, Embraesk! Simply stunning!

jp.text: さすがエムブラスク。見事な剣だね。
jp.literal: You're quite the swordsman, Embrask. What a magnificent blade you wield.

670535190.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
670535190.transcript: All I have to say is that was very good!

jp.text: いいね！バッチグーだったよ、フェリちゃん！
jp.literal: Nice! That was a perfect match, Ferry!

jp.text: ヘェー？サンちゃん、やるじゃない。
jp.literal: Huh? You're doing it, aren't you, San-chan?

707864834.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
707864834.transcript: Is it just me or did you get even stronger?

jp.text: おっと、また強くなったんじゃない？
jp.literal: Huh? You've gotten stronger again, haven't you?

763347403.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
763347403.transcript: You know, Tien's pretty quiet too. You sharpshooters don't talk much, huh?

jp.text: エッセルもだけど、呪術使いって口数が少ないのかな？
jp.literal: I'm not sure if it's just me, but do you think there aren't enough people who use ranged attacks?

771674228.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
771674228.transcript: Spar with a legend, you mean? I thought you'd never ask!

jp.text: ふふふ。実は俺も伝説の拳ってのには興味があるんだよね。
jp.literal: Actually, I'm kinda interested in that legendary fist thing too.

779737144.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
779737144.transcript: Oh, stop! My ego's big enough.

jp.text: またまた、さすがに持ち上げすぎじゃない？
jp.literal: You're lifting that thing way too much again, aren't you?

813561548.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
813561548.transcript: Served up a big helping of pain, didn't we?

jp.text: バッチリ決まったね、シャルロッテちゃん！
jp.literal: That was a perfect hit, Charlotte!

831442191.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
831442191.transcript: That works every time! A hundred percent of the time!

jp.text: ここだと思ったところにズドンとくるね！
jp.literal: I thought it was here, but it came with a thud.

846184128.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
846184128.transcript: Well said! Look out bad guys! Justice is in town!

jp.text: ああ、悪い奴は見逃せないよね
jp.literal: Ah, you can't miss the bad guys, can you?

848279374.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
848279374.transcript: Oh, you're a quick one, ain'tcha!

jp.text: おっと、素早い追撃だね。
jp.literal: Whoa! That's a quick follow-up attack!

851744062.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
851744062.transcript: You can look, but no touching. That would not bode well.

jp.text: おっと、おさわりはダメだよ。危ないからね。
jp.literal: Oops! You shouldn't touch me. It's dangerous.

855740967.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
855740967.transcript: Anyone else get a chill down their spine? No?

jp.text: んふふ、やっぱり緊張感が違うね

861400045.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
861400045.transcript: I am?... I-I mean YES! I AM! Ha ha! Finally, someone gets it!

jp.text: いやー、それほどでもあるんだよね、これが
jp.literal: No way... this is actually happening.

896237703.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
896237703.transcript: So uh, you wield primeval darkness? That's pretty cool.

jp.text: 資源より伝わるその力、実に興味深いね。
jp.literal: That power passed down from the source... it's truly fascinating.

897975882.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
897975882.transcript: Good hustle, champ! You're number one!

jp.text: いいよいいよ！次もよろしく！
jp.literal: Alright, alright! Let's do this again!

927231431.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
927231431.transcript: Theoretically speaking, what would happen if I became your vassal?

jp.text: ねぇねぇ、その炎で俺も導いてくれない？
jp.literal: Hey, hey... won't you guide me with that flame of yours?

jp.text: さすが、カタリナちゃん！

947568066.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
947568066.transcript: I'm impressed, Zeta! In fact, I think you're ready to fly solo!

jp.text: すごいね！もう全部ゼタちゃんに任せちゃおっかな？
jp.literal: Wow! Maybe I should just leave everything to you, Zeta-chan!

949564415.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
949564415.transcript: That magic show was so moving!

jp.text: さすがはイオちゃんだね。お兄さん感動しちゃったよ。
jp.literal: You're amazing, Io-chan! I'm totally impressed!

965386078.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
965386078.transcript: Hah! Well, milady, I humbly accept your kind words.

jp.text: お褒めに預かり光栄ですわ
jp.literal: I'm honored to be praised by you.

974199305.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
974199305.transcript: Gotta say, Maggs, those magic swords of yours sure are interesting.

jp.text: へぇ、マギダフリダちゃんの魔剣って面白い動きするね。
jp.literal: Huh? Magilumina-chan's mace moves in an interesting way.

982834583.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
982834583.transcript: Our teamwork has me in tears!

jp.text: これは見事な奥義だね！

993398580.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
993398580.transcript: Where we're going, nobody can stop this duo!

jp.text: ふん、向かうところ敵なしって感じだね
jp.literal: Hmph. Looks like there's no one to face off against.

998654086.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
998654086.transcript: Hearing that from the Rose Queen... I'm gonna blush.

jp.text: バラの女王にそう言われると、ちょっと照れちゃうね。
jp.literal: When the Rose Queen says that, it makes me a bit shy.

1001802885.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
1001802885.transcript: I'm just happy to do my part.

jp.text: お役に立てたようで何より、だね。
jp.literal: Glad I could be of help.
